allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const c = fs.readFileSync\('src/views/admin/Window_B_Style_Create.vue','utf8'\); const sc = c.match\(/<script[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\); const tc = c.match\(/<template[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/template>/\); console.log\('Template length:', tc?.[1]?.length || 0\); console.log\('Script length:', sc?.[1]?.length || 0\); console.log\('Has scoped style:', c.includes\('scoped'\)\);")
